chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3757 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2017 and it came up in Court on 09.01.2018 only when notice was ordered to be issued to the respondents and learned Addl. A.G. and thereafter this petition is pending without any progress. Even the petitioner has not attempted to fix the matter in Court. It shows that the petitioner has no interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
